item.title: Producer prices in the US declined 0.3% MOM in June 2026, following a downwardly revised 0.6% rise in May and below forecasts of a flat reading. It is the first decrease in PPI since August 2025 and t
item.description: pProducer prices in the US declined 0.3% MOM in June 2026, following a downwardly revised 0.6% rise in May and below forecasts of a flat reading. It is the first decrease in PPI since August 2025 and the largest since April last year./pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2FHNRQoV4boAALo95.png" /

item.title: AI will jeed $5 TRILLION every year by 2040. SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son predicts AI will require $5 trillion in annual investment by 2040. He believes AI could generate 20% of global GDP by then. A
item.description: pAI will jeed $5 TRILLION every year by 2040.br /br /&gt; SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son predicts AI will require $5 trillion in annual investment by 2040. br /&gt; He believes AI could generate 20% of global GDP by then. br /&gt; AI data centers may need 3 terawatts of power, about 1.8× today's global

item.title: An audit tells you a system was safe. It does not tell you if it still is. In a new post, @StellarOrg makes the case that onchain monitoring is the instrument panel every builder, treasury manager, an
item.description: pAn audit tells you a system was safe. It does not tell you if it still is.br /br /In a new post, a href="https://nitter.net/StellarOrg" title="Stellar"@StellarOrg/a makes the case that onchain monitoring is the instrument panel every builder, treasury manager, and position holder needs once code go
